channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dave Rubin faces online backlash after viral video highlights inaccurate Iran conflict predictions
item.description: A viral social media compilation has drawn widespread criticism toward conservative commentator Dave Rubin after it resurfaced a series of inaccurate predictions he made regarding the ongoing U.S. mil...

item.title: Missing newborn found deceased in Halifax; two individuals face charges
item.description: Halifax Regional Police have confirmed that a missing newborn baby has been found deceased following a search that ended in a wooded area in Nova Scotia. The discovery was made on Sunday afternoon, wh...

item.title: Hundreds of Basilan local leaders join Bangsamoro Federalist Party ahead of BARMM parliamentary elections
item.description: Hundreds of community leaders from Basilan have formally joined the newly established Bangsamoro Federalist Party in a symbolic oath-taking ceremony held over the weekend in Lamitan City. The event wa...

item.title: Allegations of Isa Pantami’s Possible Defection from APC to PDP Ahead of Gombe Governorship Primary
item.description: Four governorship aspirants of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) in Gombe State don raise concern say former Minister of Communications and Digital Economy, Prof. Isa Ali Pantami, fit join their part...

item.title: Arsenal’s efficient approach secures Premier League title as wasteful rivals struggle
item.description: Arsenal secured their first Premier League title in 22 years after a season defined by efficiency, tactical discipline and intelligent squad management. The article argues that the 2025–26 Premier Lea...

item.title: Trump praises India and PM Modi during call at US 250th Independence Day celebrations in Delhi
item.description: During the US 250th Independence Day celebrations held in Delhi, a virtual interaction featured former US President Donald Trump, who joined via phone call and expressed warm remarks about India and P...

item.title: Rising diesel and electricity costs place South Africa’s poultry industry under severe pressure
item.description: Lobby group FairPlay has warned that rising diesel and electricity prices are creating serious financial pressure for South Africa’s poultry industry, with possible consequences for food security, emp...

item.title: Early wet-weather chaos at Canadian Grand Prix sees Mercedes lead as McLaren strategy backfires
item.description: The Canadian Grand Prix at Circuit Gilles-Villeneuve began under wet and changeable conditions, immediately creating strategic uncertainty for teams. Dark clouds and early rain prompted difficult tyre...

item.title: Search and rescue operations ongoing after building collapse in Angeles City as responders detect signs of life
item.description: Rescue operations are currently ongoing in Angeles City, Pampanga after a building collapsed, with authorities reporting that signs of life have been detected among those trapped. Emergency responders...

item.title: Analyst questions authorship of Trump social media post on Iran negotiations
item.description: A foreign policy analyst has raised questions about a recent social media post by U.S. President Donald Trump concerning a potential negotiated settlement with Iran, suggesting that the message may no...

item.title: Officials Identify Possible Crack in Toxic Chemical Tank in Orange County, California
item.description: Fire officials in Southern California provided new details about a dangerous industrial incident involving a massive tank filled with toxic chemicals in Orange County. According to Interim Orange Coun...

item.title: South African activists return home after detention in Israel following Gaza flotilla mission
item.description: Six South African delegates involved in the Global Sumud Flotilla have returned home after what they described as a traumatic detention in an Israeli prison following their interception in internation...

item.title: FIA orders extra formation laps after false start at Canadian Grand Prix amid cold conditions
item.description: The Canadian Formula 1 race experienced an unusual disruption after officials were forced to call two additional formation laps following a false start involving driver Kimi Antonelli. The incident un...

item.title: AIIMS team conducts additional testing in Twisha Sharma death case; second autopsy report expected after detailed analysis
item.description: The case of Twisha Sharma’s death has prompted further forensic examination, with a senior AIIMS Delhi team indicating that the second post-mortem report will take additional time due to the need for ...

item.title: Repatriated Overseas Filipino Workers Join DMW Labor Day Fair to Find New Jobs Abroad
item.description: Several repatriated overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) attended the Labor Day job fair organised by the Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) to look for new employment opportunities abroad. The activity ...

item.title: Exploring the Use of Antihistamines for Managing PMDD and Perimenopause Symptoms
item.description: Recent reports highlight a growing trend where women are using over-the-counter antihistamines, such as Allegra (an H1 blocker) and Pepcid AC (an H2 blocker containing famotidine), to alleviate sympto...

item.title: Martine Carol and Her Legacy in 1950s French Cinema
item.description: Martine Carol was one of the most prominent stars of post-war French cinema, widely celebrated during the 1950s as a symbol of elegance, beauty, and glamour. Often referred to as the “Golden Girl” of ...

item.title: Rubio accuses Hezbollah of destabilizing Lebanon amid ongoing regional tensions and ceasefire fragility
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio has accused Hezbollah of attempting to plunge Lebanon back into instability, warning that the Iran-backed group is undermining the country’s democratic institutions...

item.title: CBN Governor Cardoso Commits to Orthodox Monetary Policies for Stronger Economic Confidence
item.description: Olayemi Cardoso, the Governor of the Central Bank of Nigeria, don talk say the bank no go go back to those unorthodox interventionist policies wey dem dey use before. According to am, the current refo...

item.title: EasyJet flight to London diverted to Rome after passenger reported charging power bank in aircraft hold
item.description: An EasyJet flight travelling from Hurghada, Egypt, to London Luton was diverted to Rome after a passenger informed cabin crew that a power bank was charging inside luggage stored in the aircraft hold....
